title: XBOW - Mythos for Offensive Security: XBOW's Evaluation
description: We received early access to Mythos Preview for early capability testing a few weeks back. Today, we can finally share what we found.

title: Xero Announces Integration with Anthropic’s Claude - Finovate
description: Small business management platform Xero announced its live integration with Anthropic, the AI company behind AI assistant Claude.
